engine.hints.exhausted.line1: UFO74: no more hints. rely on your own analysis.
engine.hints.exhausted.line2: you have enough to work with. READ the files.
engine.hints.progress.line1: UFO74: you seem to be making progress.
engine.hints.progress.line2: keep exploring. the truth is in the files.
engine.hints.truth.debris.1: UFO74: Physical evidence was divided, not destroyed.
engine.hints.truth.debris.2: UFO74: The wreckage traveled to multiple destinations.
engine.hints.truth.debris.3: UFO74: Transport records hold clues about material distribution.
engine.hints.truth.debris.4: UFO74: Cargo moved in different directions that week.
engine.hints.truth.containment.1: UFO74: Not everything at the site was wreckage.
engine.hints.truth.containment.2: UFO74: Medical containment requires living subjects.
engine.hints.truth.containment.3: UFO74: Some recovery operations involved more than debris.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.1: UFO74: Communication happened without spoken words.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.2: UFO74: Signal analysis revealed unusual patterns.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.3: UFO74: The visitors were not explorers in the traditional sense.
engine.hints.truth.telepathic.4: UFO74: Neural activity preceded verbal contact.
engine.hints.truth.international.1: UFO74: Brazil was not alone in the response.
engine.hints.truth.international.2: UFO74: Diplomatic channels activated faster than expected.
engine.hints.truth.international.3: UFO74: Foreign expertise arrived remarkably quickly.
engine.hints.truth.transition.1: UFO74: The timeline extends decades into the future.
engine.hints.truth.transition.2: UFO74: Thirty years is a significant interval.
engine.hints.truth.transition.3: UFO74: Some documents reference a convergence window.
engine.hints.truth.transition.4: UFO74: The end date is not when it ends—it begins.
engine.hints.directory.storage.1: UFO74: Storage logs track more than inventory.
engine.hints.directory.storage.2: UFO74: Asset manifests reveal movement patterns.
engine.hints.directory.storage.3: UFO74: Physical evidence leaves paper trails.
engine.hints.directory.comms.1: UFO74: Communication channels hold encrypted secrets.
engine.hints.directory.comms.2: UFO74: Not all intercepts are routine.
engine.hints.directory.comms.3: UFO74: Some signals defy conventional analysis.
engine.hints.directory.ops.1: UFO74: Operations involved more than cleanup.
engine.hints.directory.ops.2: UFO74: Quarantine suggests something needed containing.
engine.hints.directory.ops.3: UFO74: Recovery teams had specialized equipment.
engine.hints.directory.admin.1: UFO74: Administrative access reveals higher clearance docs.
engine.hints.directory.admin.2: UFO74: Internal memos speak more freely.
engine.hints.directory.admin.3: UFO74: Protocol documents reference unusual procedures.
engine.hints.directory.internal.1: UFO74: Internal protocols define expected behaviors.
engine.hints.directory.internal.2: UFO74: Access credentials may be documented internally.
engine.hints.directory.internal.3: UFO74: Standard procedures sometimes hide exceptions.
engine.hints.progress.noFiles.1: UFO74: You have not examined any files yet.
engine.hints.progress.fewFiles.1: UFO74: You have only scratched the surface.
engine.hints.progress.noTruths.1: UFO74: Evidence exists, but you have not recognized it.
engine.hints.progress.noTruths.2: UFO74: The pieces are there. You must see the connections.
engine.hints.progress.noTruths.3: UFO74: Read deeper. Question what you read.
engine.hints.progress.someTruths.1: UFO74: You are assembling the picture.
engine.hints.progress.someTruths.2: UFO74: Cross-reference what you have learned.
engine.hints.progress.nearComplete.1: UFO74: You are close to understanding.
engine.hints.progress.nearComplete.2: UFO74: One or two pieces remain hidden.
engine.hints.progress.nearComplete.3: UFO74: The full picture is almost visible.
engine.hints.rewind.1: UFO74: hey, don't forget you can use 'rewind' to roll back the system clock. some files were deleted... but not in the past.
engine.hints.rewind.2: UFO74: stuck? try 'rewind'. the archive state lets you see what they tried to erase.
engine.hints.rewind.3: UFO74: the archive timestamp is earlier than now. some evidence only exists in the past. use 'rewind'.
engine.hints.rewind.4: UFO74: deleted files aren't really gone. they're just... not here yet. try 'rewind'.
